intro:
You may continue onward…
You can turn back if you wish…
description:
**Chapter One**
You awaken and venture deeper into the forest.
There, you discover a mysterious ruin… but its door is firmly sealed.

Before you realize it, something lies at your feet — a ≪Silver Coin≫.
Almost without thinking, you place the coin at the center of a strange, ominous circle…

From here on, the rest of the story is yours to uncover.

The "Pixel Game Maker Series" is a series of games created using the action game creation software "Pixel Game Maker MV" that can be enjoyed on the Nintendo Switch™.
